{{Quote|Fierfek, those are Assassin corvettes...|[[Loccin]]|<ref name="Revelation" />}}
The '''CR92a ''Assassin''-class corvette''', better known as the '''modified corvette''', was a small [[Warship/Legends|warship]] first produced some time before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] and used primarily by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:CR92a_Assassin-class_corvette_SoF.png|thumb|left|250px|An ''Assassin''-class corvette attacks a [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] cargo ship]]

Designed as a more militarized successor to the famous [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], the ''Assassin''-class shared the familiar "hammerhead" styling, but it was more streamlined for greater hull strength.

In addition to a stronger hull, the ''Assassin'' had more resilient [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] and heavier firepower.

Though it shared a similar 4-3-4 engine layout, it had eight large outer engines and three small inner engines as opposed to the CR90's eleven nearly identical engines.

==History==
The ''Assassin''-class was used alongside the CR90 in system patrol squadrons to repel [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attacks on convoys and space stations. It was also used by the Rebels in hit-and-fade operations and by several groups as a transport for high-priority cargo and personnel.

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] requisitioned the [[Archer (Assassin-class)|''Archer'']] piloted by [[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] [[Nanda (ensign)|Nanda]] to conduct a personal mission of revenge.<ref name="SW 13 (DH)">[[Star Wars (2013) 13|''Star Wars'' (2013) 13]]</ref>

The traitorous [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]] used ''Assassin''-class corvettes in many of his attacks on loyal Imperial forces.<ref name="TF" /> He had at least twenty-five of these [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]] under his command during his treachery.

In [[41 ABY]], a number of ''Assassins'' corvettes were used in [[Natasi Daala|Daala's]] [[Maw Irregular Fleet]] during the [[Second Battle of Fondor]].<ref name="Revelation" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Corvette_Comparison.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Comparison of the ''Assassin''-class and a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]].]]
''Assassin''-class corvettes first appeared in the game [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']], though the ship was identified in tactical displays and in the ship database as simply "Modified Corvette". Although named and mentioned as such, the actual polygon model used for the mission was of a regular CR90 corvette. The sequels, however, feature a properly original exclusive design. Fandom often refers to the ''Assassin''-class corvette as the CR90a, but ''[[Suns of Fortune]]'' later identified it as the CR92a.

Additionally, the ''Archer'' in [[Brian Wood]]'s [[Star Wars (2013)|''Star Wars'']] comics uses the regular CR90 model.
